name: io.github.3esign/psychosynth
description: Psychometric data marketplace: Big Five profiles, cognitive biases & behavioral data via x402.

environmentVariables.name: PSYCHOSYNTH_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Psychosynth API deployment (e.g. https://your-app.vercel.app). Defaults to http://localhost:3000 for local development.

environmentVariables.name: BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base (EVM) wallet private key used to pay for queries via x402. Omit to use only the free catalog, preview, and quote tools.

environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional custom Base mainnet RPC endpoint. Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org.
